findings.evidence: `nl -ba` shows line 279 declares `@[expose] noncomputable def subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquiv`, while lines 300-313 give apply/symm simp lemmas and lines 315-362 give equality/map characteristic lemmas.
findings.fix: Remove `@[expose]`; keep consumers on `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquiv_apply`, `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquiv_symm_apply`, `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_bot_eq_iff`, and the `subgroupFiberOrbitMapOfLE_bot_*` lemmas, adding another lemma only if a downstream use still needs unfolding.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquiv` is declared `@[expose]`, exposing the quotient-lift implementation even though the public behavior is already characterized by the following simp lemmas.

summary: The bottom-subgroup API has the needed characteristic lemmas, but it still exposes the implementation body of the new equivalence unnecessarily.
